title: Full Page Colored Manga Illustration
sourceTitle: Create Full Page Colored Manga Illustration Based

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a full-page colored manga illustration based on the person in the reference photo. Use authentic manga page composition with 5–7 dynamic connected panels on a single page. Include cinematic storytelling, dramatic perspective, expressive emotions, dynamic poses, speed lines, impact frames, close-up shots, and intense visual flow.Add English comic-style sound effects, handwritten dialogue bubbles, ink splatter strokes, halftone textures, rough comic sketch lines, and graffiti-inspired brushwork. Blend vibrant colors with manga-style shading and strong contrast. Emphasize the character’s personality and aura with symbolic visual elements and atmospheric energy effects. Highly detailed, emotional, stylish, energetic, professional manga aesthetic with clean white negative space mixed with chaotic ink texture Hand-drawn look, free-flowing lines, immersive composition, high quality. Aspect ratio 9:16 HD.
